# PERF-038-done negative: unbuffered chan struct{} is the standard done/stop signal
lang: go
file: PERF-038-done-safe.go
---
package sample

type store struct {
	done chan struct{}
}

func NewStore() *store {
	s := &store{
		done: make(chan struct{}),
	}
	return s
}

func (s *store) Close() {
	close(s.done)
}
